untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (Head and Shoulders Top) requires multi-bar candlestick pattern recognition and 'ultimate high' identification after breakout, which cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators (close, high, low, volume, RSI, MACD, etc.). The signal requires: (1) identification of the specific H&S pattern structure across multiple bars, (2) confirmation of trend termination, (3) detection of the ultimate high after breakout. These require pattern-matching logic beyond the scope of OHLCV and technical indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted simplified proxy using price-above-MA for uptrend confirmation and exit on reversal, but this does not capture the core H&S pattern mechanics. Author did not provide explicit stop placement or volume conditions. Success rate is 83% in bear markets only. Recommend manual pattern detection or enhanced pattern recognition module for proper implementation.
